description: Spring RTS Lua Callins - callback functions that the engine invokes on gadgets/widgets. Synced callins run in authoritative game logic; unsynced callins run in UI/rendering contexts.

Common Callins.description: Callins available in all contexts (both synced and unsynced).

functions.name: Initialize
functions.description: Triggered when the addon loads or reloads.

functions.name: Shutdown
functions.description: Triggered during addon or game termination.

Game State Callins.description: Callins related to game state changes, available in both synced and unsynced.

functions.name: GameID
functions.description: Delivers the gameID once (hex-encoded in 101.0+).

functions.name: GamePaused
functions.description: Game is paused.

functions.name: GameUnpaused
functions.description: Game resumes from pause.

functions.name: GameOver
functions.description: Game concludes; table contains winning allyTeams (empty if undecided). This is a CALLIN that receives game over events, NOT a function to end the game.

functions.name: GameFrame
functions.description: Called every simulation frame (30/sec). Frame numbering starts at 0 in 101.0+ (previously 1).

functions.name: GamePreload
functions.description: Executes before frame 0. Not called when loading saves (104.0+).

functions.name: GameStart
functions.description: Game begins. Not called when loading saves (104.0+).

Unit Lifecycle Callins.description: Callins for unit creation, destruction, and state changes.

functions.name: UnitCreated
functions.description: Unit instantiation occurs.

functions.name: UnitFinished
functions.description: Unit construction completes.

functions.name: UnitFromFactory
functions.signature: addon.UnitFromFactory(unitID, unitDefID, unitTeam, factID, factDefID, userOrders)
functions.description: Factory produces unit.

functions.name: UnitDestroyed
functions.signature: addon.UnitDestroyed(unitID, unitDefID, unitTeam, attackerID, attackerDefID, attackerTeam)
functions.description: Unit is destroyed.

functions.name: RenderUnitDestroyed
functions.description: Called just before unit becomes invalid after death animation completes (101.0+).

functions.name: UnitDamaged
functions.signature: addon.UnitDamaged(unitID, unitDefID, unitTeam, damage, paralyzer, weaponDefID, projectileID, attackerID, attackerDefID, attackerTeam)
functions.description: Triggered after damage application (post-UnitPreDamaged). This is a notification callin, it cannot modify damage.

functions.name: UnitStunned
functions.description: Unit stun status changes (99.0+).

functions.name: UnitCloaked
functions.description: Unit activates cloaking.

functions.name: UnitDecloaked
functions.description: Unit deactivates cloaking.

functions.name: UnitIdle
functions.description: Unit command queue empties.

functions.name: UnitExperience
functions.description: Unit gains experience (when increment >= minimum set via Spring.SetExperienceGrade).

Unit Command Callins.description: Callins for unit commands and orders.

functions.name: UnitCommand
functions.signature: addon.UnitCommand(unitID, unitDefID, unitTeam, cmdID, cmdParams, cmdOpts, cmdTag)
functions.description: Called after unit accepts command (post-AllowCommand).

functions.name: UnitCmdDone
functions.signature: addon.UnitCmdDone(unitID, unitDefID, unitTeam, cmdID, cmdParams, cmdOpts, cmdTag)
functions.description: Unit completes a command.

Unit Transport Callins.description: Callins for unit loading/unloading from transports.

functions.name: UnitLoaded
functions.description: Unit is loaded into transport.

functions.name: UnitUnloaded
functions.description: Unit is unloaded from transport.

Unit Visibility Callins.description: Callins for unit visibility changes (LOS, radar).

functions.name: UnitEnteredLos
functions.description: Unit enters LOS; allyTeam parameter identifies observer.

functions.name: UnitLeftLos
functions.description: Unit departs LOS. For widgets, called before departure, allowing position retrieval.

functions.name: UnitEnteredRadar
functions.description: Unit enters radar coverage (also called when unit enters LOS).

functions.name: UnitLeftRadar
functions.description: Unit leaves radar. For widgets, called after departure; position unavailable.

functions.name: UnitSeismicPing
functions.signature: addon.UnitSeismicPing(x, y, z, strength, allyTeam, unitID, unitDefID)
functions.description: Unit emits seismic signature (see unitDef: seismicSignature).

Unit Transfer Callins.description: Callins for unit ownership changes between teams.

functions.name: UnitGiven
functions.description: Unit transferred between teams (called after UnitTaken); unit now belongs to newTeam.

functions.name: UnitTaken
functions.description: Unit transferred between teams (called before UnitGiven); unit still assigned to oldTeam.

functions.name: UnitReverseBuilt
functions.description: Unit reverts to nanoframe (incomplete state).

Weapon Callins.description: Callins for weapon and stockpile events.

functions.name: StockpileChanged
functions.signature: addon.StockpileChanged(unitID, unitDefID, unitTeam, weaponNum, oldCount, newCount)
functions.description: Stockpile weapon count increases/decreases.

functions.name: FeatureCreated
functions.description: Feature instantiation occurs.

functions.name: FeatureDamaged
functions.signature: addon.FeatureDamaged(featureID, featureDefID, featureTeam, damage, weaponDefID, projectileID, attackerID, attackerDefID, attackerTeam)
functions.description: Feature receives damage.

functions.name: FeatureDestroyed
functions.description: Feature is destroyed.

Projectile Callins.description: Callins for projectile events. Only fires for weaponDefIDs registered via Script.SetWatchWeapon.

functions.name: ProjectileCreated
functions.description: Called when projectile instantiates. Only fires for registered weapons.

functions.name: ProjectileDestroyed
functions.description: Projectile is destroyed. Only fires for registered weapons.

Synced-Only Callins.description: Callins that only run in synced (authoritative game logic) context. These can modify game state.

functions.name: AllowCommand
functions.signature: addon.AllowCommand(unitID, unitDefID, unitTeam, cmdID, cmdParams, cmdOptions, cmdTag, synced) -> bool allow
functions.description: Executed when command is issued, before queue modification. Return false to prevent queueing.

functions.name: CommandFallback
functions.signature: addon.CommandFallback(unitID, unitDefID, unitTeam, cmdID, cmdParams, cmdOptions, cmdTag) -> bool used, bool finished
functions.description: Invoked when unit encounters unknown commands. First return indicates handler consumed command; second indicates completion (true = remove, false = retry).

functions.name: AllowUnitCreation
functions.signature: addon.AllowUnitCreation(unitDefID, builderID, builderTeam, x, y, z, facing) -> bool allow
functions.description: Executed before unit instantiation. Return false to prevent creation.

functions.name: AllowUnitTransfer
functions.signature: addon.AllowUnitTransfer(unitID, unitDefID, oldTeam, newTeam, capture) -> bool allow
functions.description: Executed before team reassignment. Return false to prevent transfer.

functions.name: AllowFeatureCreation
functions.signature: addon.AllowFeatureCreation(featureDefID, teamID, x, y, z) -> bool allow
functions.description: Executed before feature instantiation. Return false to prevent creation.

functions.name: AllowUnitBuildStep
functions.signature: addon.AllowUnitBuildStep(builderID, builderTeam, unitID, unitDefID, part) -> bool allow
functions.description: Called before unit build percentage progresses. Return false to prevent progress.

functions.name: AllowFeatureBuildStep
functions.signature: addon.AllowFeatureBuildStep(builderID, builderTeam, featureID, featureDefID, part) -> bool allow
functions.description: Called before feature build percentage changes. Applies to construction, reclamation, resurrection, and refilling. Negative part values indicate reclamation.

functions.name: AllowResourceLevel
functions.description: Controls team resource-sharing level changes.

functions.name: AllowResourceTransfer
functions.signature: addon.AllowResourceTransfer(oldTeamID, newTeamID, res, amount) -> bool allow
functions.description: Executed before inter-team resource transfer.

functions.name: TeamChanged
functions.description: Team status changes.

functions.name: TeamDied
functions.description: Team is eliminated (see Spring.KillTeam).

functions.name: AllowStartPosition
functions.signature: addon.AllowStartPosition(playerID, teamID, readyState, clampedX, clampedY, clampedZ, rawX, rawY, rawZ) -> bool allow
functions.description: Validates start position. readyState: 0=position selected, 1=ready clicked, 2=ready forced/auto, 3=load failed.

functions.name: AllowDirectUnitControl
functions.signature: addon.AllowDirectUnitControl(unitID, unitDefID, unitTeam, playerID) -> bool allow
functions.description: Determines FPS-view controllability.

functions.name: AllowWeaponTargetCheck
functions.signature: addon.AllowWeaponTargetCheck(attackerID, attackerWeaponNum, attackerWeaponDefID) -> bool allowCheck, bool ignoreCheck
functions.description: Controls auto-targeting capability.

functions.name: AllowWeaponTarget
functions.signature: addon.AllowWeaponTarget(attackerID, targetID, attackerWeaponNum, attackerWeaponDefID, defPriority) -> bool allowed, number newPriority
functions.description: Regulates specific targeting decisions; second return modifies priority (lower=targeted first).

functions.name: AllowWeaponInterceptTarget
functions.description: Controls interceptor targeting (registered weapons only).

functions.name: AllowBuilderHoldFire
functions.description: Controls construction unit actions. action: -1=Build, CMD.REPAIR, CMD.RECLAIM, CMD.RESTORE, CMD.RESURRECT, CMD.CAPTURE.

functions.name: UnitPreDamaged
functions.signature: addon.UnitPreDamaged(unitID, unitDefID, unitTeam, damage, paralyzer, weaponDefID, projectileID, attackerID, attackerDefID, attackerTeam) -> number newDamage, number impulseMult
functions.description: Called BEFORE damage application; enables damage/impulse modification. Return newDamage to modify damage dealt, impulseMult to scale knockback. This is the ONLY callin that can modify damage before it is applied.

functions.name: ShieldPreDamaged
functions.signature: addon.ShieldPreDamaged(proID, shieldCarrier, boolBounceProjectile, beamEmitterWeaponNum, beamEmitterUnitID, startX, startY, startZ, hitX, hitY, hitZ) -> bool handleCollision
functions.description: Called before shield-projectile collision logic. Return true to handle collision manually.

functions.name: FeaturePreDamaged
functions.signature: addon.FeaturePreDamaged(featureID, featureDefID, featureTeam, damage, weaponDefID, projectileID, attackerID, attackerDefID, attackerTeam) -> number newDamage, number impulseMult
functions.description: Called before feature damage application; enables damage/impulse modification.

functions.name: Explosion
functions.signature: addon.Explosion(weaponDefID, px, py, pz, AttackerID, ProjectileID) -> bool noGfx
functions.description: Called when explosion occurs; return true to suppress engine graphical effects.

functions.name: UnitUnitCollision
functions.description: Units collide (both must be registered via Script.SetWatchUnit).

functions.name: UnitFeatureCollision
functions.description: Unit collides with feature (unit and feature must be registered).

functions.name: TerraformComplete
functions.signature: addon.TerraformComplete(unitID, unitDefID, unitTeam, buildUnitID, buildUnitDefID, buildUnitTeam) -> bool stop
functions.description: Pre-building terrain leveling completes; return true to terminate current build order.

functions.name: MoveCtrlNotify
functions.signature: addon.MoveCtrlNotify(unitID, unitDefID, unitTeam, data) -> bool moveCtrlComplete
functions.description: Requires both Spring.MoveCtrl.SetCollideStop and Spring.MoveCtrl.SetTrackGround enabled. Return false for continued script control, true to restore engine control.

functions.name: RecvLuaMsg
functions.description: Receives messages from unsynced via Spring.SendLuaRulesMsg or Spring.SendLuaUIMsg.

functions.name: Load
functions.description: Called after GamePreload, before GameStart for loading saved games.

Chat and Message Callins.description: Callins for chat and UI commands.

functions.name: GotChatMsg
functions.description: Called when UI commands are issued (e.g., /foo or /luarules foo).

functions.name: PlayerChanged
functions.description: Triggered when player status changes (e.g., spectator transition).

functions.name: PlayerAdded
functions.description: New player joins.

functions.name: PlayerRemoved
functions.description: Player leaves or is removed.

Drawing Callins.description: Callins for rendering and drawing (unsynced only).

functions.name: ViewResize
functions.description: Fired when viewport dimensions change.

functions.name: Update
functions.description: Invoked every rendered frame; parameter is elapsed time in seconds.

functions.name: DrawGenesis
functions.description: Updates textures and shaders; does not render to screen.

functions.name: DrawWorldPreUnit
functions.description: Executes before engine renders units, features, and water.

functions.name: DrawWorld
functions.description: Executes after command queues and map elements are drawn.

functions.name: DrawWorldShadow
functions.description: Shadow rendering pass.

functions.name: DrawScreen
functions.description: Screen-space drawing (vsx, vsy are screen coordinates).

functions.name: DrawScreenEffects
functions.description: Screen-space effects rendering.

functions.name: DrawInMinimap
functions.description: Renders within minimap bounds (sx, sy relative to minimap position/scale).

functions.name: DrawUnit
functions.description: Custom unit rendering. Return true to suppress engine rendering. drawMode: 0=notDrawing, 1=normalDraw, 2=shadowDraw, 3=reflectionDraw, 4=refractionDraw, 5=gameDeferredDraw.

functions.name: DrawFeature
functions.description: Custom feature rendering. Return true to suppress engine rendering.

functions.name: DrawProjectile
functions.description: Custom projectile rendering. Return true to suppress engine rendering.

Input Handling Callins.description: Callins for mouse and keyboard input (unsynced only).

functions.name: IsAbove
functions.description: Determines if coordinates fall within the addon's interactive region. Must return true to enable Mouse* events.

functions.name: KeyPress
functions.description: Called repeatedly while a key is depressed. mods table contains alt, ctrl, meta, shift booleans. Return true to prevent other handlers.

functions.name: KeyRelease
functions.description: Triggered when a key is released.

functions.name: TextInput
functions.description: Fires when keyboard input generates text (version 97.0+).

functions.name: MousePress
functions.description: Triggered on mouse button press. Supports up to 7 buttons. Must return true to enable MouseRelease.

functions.name: MouseRelease
functions.description: Triggered on mouse button release.

functions.name: MouseWheel
functions.description: Fired when scrolling occurs; up indicates direction, value indicates magnitude.

functions.name: MouseMove
functions.description: Called when the cursor moves. dx and dy represent displacement.

UI Command Callins.description: Callins for UI command handling (unsynced only).

functions.name: DefaultCommand
functions.description: Establishes the default action for selected objects. type is 'unit' or 'feature'.

functions.name: CommandNotify
functions.description: Invoked when commands are issued. Returning true removes the command before transmission.

functions.name: CommandsChanged
functions.description: Fires when available command descriptions change.

functions.name: WorldTooltip
functions.signature: addon.WorldTooltip(ttType, data1, data2, data3) -> string newTooltip
functions.description: Generates tooltips for objects. ttType values: 'unit' (unitID), 'feature' (featureID), 'ground' (x, y, z), 'selection'.

functions.name: GetTooltip
functions.description: Called when IsAbove returns true.

Synced-Unsynced Communication.description: Callins for communication between synced and unsynced contexts.

functions.name: RecvFromSynced
functions.description: Receives messages from synced via SendToUnsynced.

functions.name: Save
functions.description: Invoked on '/save' or '/savegame' command; receives userdatum representing savegame zip.

Special Damage WeaponDefIDs.description: Special weaponDefID values used in damage callins to indicate non-weapon damage sources.
